codeReview.summary: v0.3.0 changelog entry was correctly added to CHANGELOG.md at the top of the file. All 6 observability features are documented with proper formatting and descriptions. Entry follows the existing document style and conventions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The docs-worker skill specified in feature.skillName does not exist in the available skills list. The worker noted this in skillFeedback and completed the work directly using base procedures.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows 'Error: Skill "docs-worker" not found' followed by worker proceeding with direct implementation. skillFeedback.followedProcedure is false with deviation documented.

summary: The update-changelog feature was successfully implemented. A v0.3.0 entry was added to CHANGELOG.md with all 6 observability features (mapj health, mapj observability metrics, ObservableCommand interface, zap logging, --observe flag, --log-level flag). The entry is properly formatted with date 2026-04-12, follows existing document conventions, and satisfies both VAL-CHANGELOG-001 (v0.3.0 Entry Exists) and VAL-CHANGELOG-002 (Observability Features Listed) assertions.
